questions.question: The coral reef system ---- steadily for decades before marine biologists ---- the full extent of thermal bleaching and linked it to ocean acidification.

feedback.hint: 'For decades before biologists documented' → uzun süreli arka plan + referans noktası. İkinci eylem anlık tamamlanmış.
feedback.logic: 'For decades before' → referans noktasına kadar süren eylem → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been degrading'. Belgeleme anlık → Simple Past: 'documented'.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'had degraded' süreç vurgusunu yok eder; 'for decades' süreklilik işaret eder → Continuous zorunlu.

questions.question: Electric vehicle adoption ---- sharply since several governments ---- generous subsidies and reduced import tariffs two years ago.

feedback.hint: 'Since governments introduced' → başlangıç noktası. Bugüne uzanan artış.
feedback.logic: 'Since + Simple Past (introduced two years ago)' → başlangıç noktası. Bugüne uzanan artış → Present Perfect: 'has risen'.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'have introduced' → 'two years ago' belirli geçmiş zaman → Simple Past 'introduced' gerekli.

questions.question: By the time the documentary crew ---- the Arctic research station next March, the scientists ---- in isolation for eight consecutive months.
options: A) reaches / will have been living
D) has reached / will have been living

feedback.hint: 'By the time it reaches next March' → time clause: Simple Present. 'Eight consecutive months' → süreç vurgusu.
feedback.logic: 'By the time + Simple Present (reaches)' → time clause. 'Eight months' süreç → Future Perfect Continuous: 'will have been living'.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'will live' → Simple Future süreç vurgusunu kaybeder; 'eight consecutive months' → Continuous gerekli.

questions.question: Developmental psychologists maintain that secure attachment in early childhood ---- long-term emotional resilience and ---- the risk of anxiety disorders in adulthood.

feedback.hint: 'Maintain that...' + genel bilimsel gerçek. Her iki eylem aynı düzlemde mi?
feedback.logic: 'Maintain that' + genel bilimsel gerçek → Simple Present: 'fosters / reduces'. Kalıcı araştırma bulgusunu Simple Present aktarır.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'has fostered / reduced' → Present Perfect belirli deneyime bağlar; genel bilimsel gerçek için Simple Present tercih edilir.

questions.question: The lost city of Ani ---- hidden beneath layers of soil for nearly nine centuries before Turkish archaeologists ---- excavating it in the nineteenth century.

feedback.hint: 'For nearly nine centuries before archaeologists began' → süreç + referans noktası.
feedback.logic: 'For nine centuries before' → uzun süreli devam eden durum → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been lying'. Kazı başlangıcı → Simple Past: 'began'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'had lain / had begun' → kazıyı da Past Perfect yapar; kazı referans noktasıdır — Simple Past gerekli.

questions.question: I ---- a volunteer abroad for the past two years, and by the end of next month, I ---- more than three thousand hours of community service.
options: A) have been working as / will have completed
C) have worked as / will complete
D) have been working as / will complete
E) worked as / will have completed

feedback.hint: 'For the past two years' → süreç. 'By the end of next month' → gelecekte tamamlanmış.
feedback.logic: 'For the past two years' → Present Perfect Continuous. 'By the end of next month' → Future Perfect: 'will have completed'.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'will complete' → Simple Future; 'by the end of next month' tamamlanmış olacağını vurgular → Future Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The tech startup ---- impressive early growth but ---- to scale sustainably due to persistent supply chain vulnerabilities.
options: A) showed / has continued to struggle
D) has shown / continues to struggle
E) showed / had continued to struggle

feedback.hint: Early growth geçmişte tamamlandı. Mücadele bugüne uzanıyor mu?
feedback.logic: 'Showed impressive early growth' → geçmişte tamamlanmış → Simple Past. 'Has continued to struggle' → geçmişten bugüne uzanan devam eden mücadele → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'showed / struggled' → her ikisini Simple Past yapar; mücadele hâlâ devam ediyorsa Present Perfect daha uygun.

questions.question: Just as the panel of judges ---- their deliberations, a new piece of evidence ---- that fundamentally altered their assessment of the case.

feedback.hint: 'Just as' → süregelen arka plan + anlık kesinti. Yeni kanıt anlık mı?
feedback.logic: 'Just as judges were concluding' → arka plan devam eden → Past Continuous. Yeni kanıt ani → Simple Past: 'emerged'.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'had emerged' → kanıtı müzakereden önce başlatır; 'just as' eş zamanlılık → Simple Past gerekli.

questions.question: The youth orchestra ---- its international repertoire over the last three seasons and ---- several prestigious awards during that period.

feedback.hint: 'Over the last three seasons' → Present Perfect. Her iki eylem de aynı dönemde.
feedback.logic: 'Over the last three seasons' → Present Perfect: 'has expanded / has won'. Her iki eylem aynı dönemin parçası.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'has expanded / won' → ödülleri Simple Past yapar; 'during that period' her ikisini de Present Perfect'e bağlar.

questions.question: The ancient irrigation canal ---- in continuous use for nearly a thousand years before it ---- abandoned as the river ---- its course.
options: B) was / had been abandoned / shifted
C) had been / abandoned / had shifted
E) had been / was / had shifted

feedback.hint: Üç eylem kronolojisi: kullanım (uzun önce) → terk edilme (referans) → nehrin yönünü değiştirmesi (neden veya eş zamanlı).
feedback.logic: Kullanım terk edilmeden önce bin yıl sürdü → Past Perfect: 'had been in use'. Terk edilme referans noktası → Simple Past Passive: 'was abandoned'. Nehrin yön değişimi → Simple Past: 'shifted'.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'had shifted' → nehrin yön değişimini terk edilmeden önce başlatır; iki eylem eş zamanlı veya sıralı — Simple Past daha tutarlı.

questions.question: All laboratory equipment ---- sterilised between uses; failure to comply ---- in the immediate suspension of the researcher's access privileges.
options: D) has to be / may result
E) ought to be / will result

feedback.hint: Laboratuvar güvenlik kuralı → kesin zorunluluk. Uyumsuzluk → kesin politika yaptırımı.
feedback.logic: 'Must be sterilised' = kesin zorunluluk (pasif). 'Will result in suspension' = kesin politika bildirimi.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'would result' → hipotetik kullanım; uyumsuzluğun sonucu kesin kural — 'will result' gerekli.

questions.question: The patient's symptoms ---- improved considerably by now; the prescribed course of treatment ---- as directed from the outset.
options: A) should have / must not have been followed
B) would have / was not followed
C) should have / could not have been followed
D) ought to have / had not been followed
E) must have / was not followed

feedback.hint: 'By now' + iyileşme bekleniyordu ama olmadı → eleştiri. Tedavi takip edilmedi → geçmiş olumsuz pasif.
feedback.logic: 'Should have improved' = beklenen ama gerçekleşmemiş durum. 'Must not have been followed' = tedavinin takip edilmediğine dair güçlü geçmiş çıkarım (pasif).
feedback.pitfall: E) 'must have improved' → güçlü geçmiş çıkarım 'iyileşmiş olmalı' anlamı verir; 'by now' + eleştiri tonu ile çelişir.

questions.question: You ---- submit the final draft before speaking to your supervisor; a preliminary discussion ---- identify weaknesses before you invest weeks of revisions.

feedback.hint: 'Need not' = zorunluluk yok. 'Could identify' = öneri / olasılık.
feedback.logic: 'Need not submit' = zorunluluk yok. 'A discussion could identify weaknesses' = faydalı olasılık önerisi.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'don't have to / could' → yakın ama 'need not' daha akademik ve vurgulu sınav tercihi.

questions.question: She ---- the prestigious fellowship had the selection committee ---- her research output and community impact more holistically.
options: C) would have received / had assessed

feedback.hint: Inverted conditional: 'had the committee assessed'. Type 3 koşul + sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Had the committee assessed' → Past Perfect inverted (Type 3). 'Would have received' → Type 3 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'had assessed' inverted değil; 'had the committee' yapısında 'had' inversion için cümle başında gelir — A şıkkı bu yapıyı içermiyor mu? A doğru: 'she would have received... had the committee assessed' inverted.

questions.question: The lights have been on all night in the editorial office; the team ---- on deadline-critical revisions, or someone ---- to switch them off.
options: B) should be working / must have forgotten
C) must be working / must have forgotten
E) must be working / may have forgotten

feedback.hint: İki olası açıklama: biri güçlü şimdiki çıkarım, diğeri zayıf geçmiş olasılık.
feedback.logic: 'Must be working' = güçlü şimdiki çıkarım. 'May have forgotten' = zayıf belirsiz geçmiş olasılık.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'must have forgotten' → iki 'must' yan yana çelişkili güçlü çıkarım — biri alternatif olduğundan 'may' belirsizliği korumalı.

questions.question: Young people ---- to navigate an increasingly fragmented information landscape, and no single digital literacy course ---- adequately equip them for every challenge.

feedback.hint: 'Are bound to' = kaçınılmazlık. 'No course can adequately equip' = kapasite sınırı.
feedback.logic: 'Are bound to navigate' = kaçınılmaz geleceği ifade eden idiom. 'No course can adequately equip' = genel kapasite sınırı.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'will equip' → kesin gelecek taahhüt; 'can' kapasite sınırını daha doğru ifade eder.

questions.question: She ---- her application for the research grant; the missed deadline ---- her funding for an entire academic year.
options: A) should have submitted / has delayed
C) should have submitted / would have delayed
D) ought to submit / has delayed
E) should have submitted / had delayed

feedback.hint: Başvuru yapılmadı → geçmiş pişmanlık. Gecikme sonucu gerçek ve devam ediyor.
feedback.logic: 'Should have submitted' = geçmişte yapılması gereken ama yapılmamış. 'Has delayed funding' = gerçekleşen ve bugüne uzanan sonuç → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'would have delayed' → hipotetik sonuç; gecikme zaten gerçekleşti → Present Perfect 'has delayed' gerekli.

questions.question: The conference venue ---- be accessed only through the main entrance; all other doors ---- during the event for security reasons.
options: E) is to / will be locked

feedback.hint: Resmi etkinlik kuralı → 'is to' yapısı. 'Will be locked' → gelecek pasif plan.
feedback.logic: 'Is to be accessed only through' = resmi protokol/kural bildirimi. 'Will be locked during the event' = gelecek plan → Simple Future Passive.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'must be accessed only through' → 'must' çok doğrudan emir; 'is to' resmi etkinlik/protokol bağlamında daha uygun.

questions.question: This ---- the original artefact; no authentic piece from that period ---- stored without climate control for that length of time without significant deterioration.
options: A) cannot be / could have been
B) must not be / could have been
C) cannot be / must have been
D) may not be / could have been
E) cannot be / would have been

feedback.hint: Şimdiki güçlü olumsuz çıkarım. 'Could have been stored' → geçmiş imkânsız/olanaksız koşul.
feedback.logic: 'Cannot be the original' = güçlü olumsuz çıkarım. 'Could have been stored without climate control' = geçmişte mümkün olmazdı.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'must have been stored' → güçlü geçmiş çıkarım 'depolanmış olmalı'; oysa bağlam depolanmasının imkânsız olduğunu gösteriyor.

questions.question: The early warning system ---- have detected the anomaly hours before the incident; had it been operational, the damage ---- substantially mitigated.
options: D) ought to / could have been

feedback.hint: Sistem tespit etmeliydi ama etmedi → eleştiri. 'Had it been operational' → Type 3 koşul → sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Should have detected' = geçmişte yapılması gereken ama yapılmamış. 'Had it been operational, the damage could have been mitigated' = Type 3 → 'could have been'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'would have been mitigated' → deterministic Type 3 sonucu; 'could have been' 'mümkün olabilirdi' anlamıyla daha uygun.

questions.question: The biodegradable packaging initiative ---- launched by three competing companies simultaneously last year, and sales of sustainable products ---- by over forty percent since.

feedback.hint: 'Last year' → geçmiş. 'Since' → bugüne uzanan artış.
feedback.logic: 'Last year' → Simple Past Passive: 'was launched'. 'Since' → Present Perfect: 'have risen'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'rose' → Simple Past; 'since' bugüne uzanan süreci gösterir → Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: It ---- now ---- by cognitive scientists that habitual multitasking ---- the brain's capacity for sustained deep focus over time.

feedback.hint: 'It is established that' → impersonal passive. Ardından genel bilimsel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'It is now established that' = impersonal passive genel kabul. 'Diminishes capacity' = genel bilimsel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'has diminished' → Present Perfect; genel bilimsel gerçek Simple Present ile ifade edilir.

questions.question: The festival programme ---- being ---- for next summer, and all participating artists ---- to submit their portfolios before the end of this month.
options: B) has / been finalised / were required
E) is / being finalised / will be required

feedback.hint: 'Is being finalised' → şu an devam eden. 'Are required to submit' → şimdiki gereklilik.
feedback.logic: 'Is being finalised' → Present Continuous Passive. 'Are required to submit before the end of this month' → Simple Present Passive (şimdiki gereklilik).
feedback.pitfall: E) 'will be required' → gelecek zorunluluk; 'before the end of this month' şimdiki gereklilik → Simple Present Passive gerekli.

questions.question: The controversial decision ---- made without consultation before residents ---- an opportunity to voice their concerns publicly.
options: C) had been / had been given
E) had been made / were given

feedback.hint: 'Before residents were given an opportunity' → karar söz hakkından önce alındı. Kronoloji.
feedback.logic: Karar → söz hakkı verilmeden önce alındı → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been made'. Söz hakkı referans noktası → Simple Past Passive: 'were given'.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'was / had been given' → zamanları tersine çevirir; karar söz hakkından önce alındı, 'had been' ilk eyleme ait.

questions.question: The research paper ---- peer-reviewed by three independent scholars before it ---- to the journal and the final version ---- online within weeks.
options: A) had been / was submitted / was published
B) was / had been submitted / was published
C) had been / was submitted / has been published
D) was / was submitted / was published
E) had been / submitted / was published

feedback.hint: Üç eylem kronolojisi: hakemlik (önce) → gönderim (referans) → yayın (sonra).
feedback.logic: Hakemlik gönderimden önce → Past Perfect Passive. Gönderim referans noktası → Simple Past Passive. Yayın ardından → Simple Past Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'has been published' → Present Perfect; yayın geçmişte tamamlandı — Simple Past Passive gerekli.

questions.question: The new cycling infrastructure ---- currently ---- across all twelve districts of the city, and a comprehensive assessment report ---- to the mayor's office by Q3.
options: A) is / being rolled out / will be submitted
B) has / been rolled out / is submitted
C) is / being rolled out / is submitted
D) was / being rolled out / will be submitted
E) is / rolled out / will have been submitted

feedback.hint: 'Currently' → devam eden pasif. 'By Q3' → gelecek pasif plan.
feedback.logic: 'Currently being rolled out' → Present Continuous Passive. 'Will be submitted to the mayor's office by Q3' → Simple Future Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'is submitted' → Simple Present Passive; rapor gelecekte sunulacak — 'will be submitted' gerekli.

questions.question: The athlete ---- disqualified from the competition, and her world ranking ---- accordingly ever since the decision ---- upheld on appeal.
options: A) was / has been affected / was
B) has been / was affected / was
C) was / was affected / has been
D) had been / has been affected / was
E) was / has been affected / has been

feedback.hint: 'Was disqualified' → geçmiş. 'Ever since... was upheld' → bugüne uzanan etki. 'Was upheld on appeal' → geçmiş.
feedback.logic: 'Was disqualified' → Simple Past Passive. 'Has been affected ever since' → Present Perfect Passive. 'The decision was upheld' → Simple Past Passive.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'has been upheld' → Present Perfect; 'on appeal' belirli geçmiş eylem → Simple Past 'was upheld' gerekli.

questions.question: The winning design ---- selected by a panel of international experts, and the construction ---- to begin next spring, weather permitting.

feedback.hint: Seçim → güncel haber. Yapım planı → şimdiki durum.
feedback.logic: 'Has been selected' → güncel → Present Perfect Passive. 'Is scheduled to begin' → şimdiki mevcut plan → Simple Present Passive.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'was selected / is scheduled' → seçimi Simple Past yapar; güncel haber → Present Perfect daha uygun.

questions.question: By the end of the decade, it ---- estimated that renewable energy ---- for more than sixty percent of the country's total electricity generation.

feedback.hint: 'By the end of the decade' → gelecekte tamamlanmış. 'It is estimated that' → impersonal passive.
feedback.logic: 'It is estimated that' = impersonal Simple Present Passive. 'By the end of the decade + more than sixty percent' → Future Perfect: 'will have accounted for'.
feedback.pitfall: A) 'will account' → Simple Future; 'by the end of the decade' tamamlanmışlık vurgular → Future Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The composer's unfinished symphony ---- in a private archive for over eighty years before it ---- to a wider audience and ---- as a landmark of late Romantic music.
options: A) had been held / was introduced / recognised
B) was held / had been introduced / recognised
C) had been held / was introduced / was recognised
E) had been held / introduced / was recognised

feedback.hint: Üç eylem: arşivde tutuldu (önce) → geniş kitleye tanıtıldı (referans) → dönüm noktası olarak tanındı (eş zamanlı).
feedback.logic: Arşivde tutulma tanıtımdan önce → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been held'. Tanıtım referans noktası → Simple Past Passive: 'was introduced'. Tanınma eş zamanlı → Simple Past Passive: 'was recognised'.
feedback.pitfall: A) 'recognised' passive değil active — 'was recognised' zorunlu; müzik kendiliğinden tanınmaz, edilgen.

questions.question: If schools ---- more systematic instruction in financial literacy, young adults ---- better equipped to navigate the challenges of independent living.
options: E) had provided / would have been

feedback.hint: Okullar şu an bu eğitimi sistematik biçimde vermiyor → mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez.
feedback.logic: Mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez → Type 2: 'provided / would be'.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'had provided / would be' → Mixed Conditional; bağlam tamamen şimdiki durum → Type 2 tutarlılığı gerektirir.

questions.question: I wish the international community ---- more decisively to the early warning signs of the crisis; countless lives ---- since.
options: A) had responded / could have been saved
C) had responded / could be saved
D) would respond / could have been saved
E) responded / could have been saved

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık. 'Since' → geçmişten bugüne uzanan gerçekleşmemiş alternatif.
feedback.logic: 'Wish + Past Perfect' = geçmiş pişmanlık: 'had responded'. 'Could have been saved since' = geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş pasif olasılık.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'could be saved' → şimdiki olasılık; kurtarılabilecek hayatlar geçmişe ait → 'could have been saved'.

questions.question: ---- adequate funding ---- allocated to mental health services over the past decade, the current strain on emergency departments ---- far less severe today.
options: C) Had / been / would have been
D) Were / to be / would be

feedback.hint: Inverted + Mixed. 'Over the past decade' → geçmiş koşul. 'Today' → şimdiki etki.
feedback.logic: 'Had adequate funding been allocated' → Past Perfect Passive inverted. 'Today' → şimdiki etki → Mixed: 'would be'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'would have been' → Type 3 geçmiş sonuç; 'today' şimdiki anı işaret eder → Mixed Conditional, 'would be' gerekli.

questions.question: She wishes her university ---- a wider range of interdisciplinary programmes; she ---- to combine her interests in data science and environmental policy.
options: B) had offered / would have been able
C) would offer / would be able
E) offered / would have been able

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + mevcut duruma pişmanlık. Üniversite hâlâ bu programları sunmuyor → Type 2 sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Wish + Simple Past' = mevcut duruma pişmanlık: 'offered'. 'Would be able to combine' = Type 2 şimdiki sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'had offered / would have been able' → geçmiş pişmanlık + Type 3; bağlam şimdiki durum → Type 2 gerekli.

questions.question: ---- the city council ---- the rezoning proposal without an environmental impact assessment, local conservation groups ---- legal action to block the development.
options: B) Were / to approve / would take
E) Were / to approve / will take

feedback.hint: 'Should + subject + base form' → Type 1 inversion (gerçek koşul). 'Will take action' → gerçek gelecek sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Should the council approve' = Type 1 inversion (gerçek olasılık). 'Will take legal action' = gerçek gelecek sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'should approve / would take' → 'would' Type 2 sonucu; 'should' inversion Type 1 → 'will' gerekli.

questions.question: If only the research team ---- the data more rigorously; the methodological flaw ---- the entire study's credibility.
options: C) had validated / would have undermined

feedback.hint: 'If only' + geçmiş pişmanlık. Güvenilirlik hasarı zaten gerçekleşmiş ve devam ediyor.
feedback.logic: 'If only + Past Perfect' = geçmiş pişmanlık. 'Has undermined credibility' = gerçekleşen ve bugüne uzanan etki → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'would have undermined' → Type 3 hipotetik sonuç; hasar zaten gerçekleşti → Present Perfect 'has undermined' gerekli.

questions.question: It is about time universities ---- the assumption that standardised tests accurately measure intelligence rather than ---- them as the sole gateway to higher education.

feedback.hint: 'It is about time + ...' → Simple Past subjunctive. 'Rather than + ...' → gerund.
feedback.logic: 'It is about time + Simple Past': 'questioned'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'using'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to use' → 'rather than' edat → gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: Provided that the clinical trial ---- positive results by the third phase, the drug ---- fast-tracked for regulatory approval.

feedback.hint: 'Provided that' → gerçek koşul. 'By the third phase' → gelecek.
feedback.logic: 'Provided that + Simple Present (shows)' → Type 1 gerçek koşul. Gerçek gelecek sonuç: 'will be fast-tracked'.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'showed / would be' → Type 2 hipotetik; gerçek klinik süreç → Type 1 gerekli.

questions.question: Even if the startup ---- substantial venture capital funding next quarter, the founders ---- to revise their business model to ensure long-term viability.
options: C) had secured / would still need
E) were to secure / will still need

feedback.hint: 'Even if' → hipotetik gelecek senaryo. Fon alınsa bile revizyon hâlâ gerekli.
feedback.logic: 'Even if + Simple Past (secured)' → hipotetik Type 2. 'Would still need' = Type 2 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: A) 'secures / will still need' → Type 1; 'even if' hipotezi ortadan kaldırır — 'would' koşullu gerekli.

questions.question: She deeply regrets ---- not having spoken more candidly during the performance review; had she done so, the working relationship ---- far more productively.

feedback.hint: 'Had she done so' → Past Perfect inverted Type 3. Sonuç da geçmişte gerçekleşmemiş.
feedback.logic: 'Had she done so' → inverted Past Perfect (Type 3). 'Would have developed more productively' → Type 3 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: A) 'could have developed' → olasılık içerir; 'would have developed' Type 3'teki mantıksal kesin sonucu daha güçlü ifade eder.

questions.question: The review board urged ---- all submitted proposals ---- on merit alone and ---- no funding decision ---- influenced by external political pressure.
options: A) that / be evaluated / that / be
B) that / was evaluated / and / was
C) whether / be evaluated / whether / be
D) that / be evaluated / and / be
E) that / were evaluated / that / were

feedback.hint: 'Urged that' → subjunctive. İki paralel talep, her ikisi de 'that' ile noun clause içinde.
feedback.logic: 'Urge that + subjunctive (base form)': 'be evaluated / be influenced'. Her iki talep 'that' noun clause içinde.
feedback.pitfall: D) İkinci 'that'ı düşürür; formal bağlamda paralel noun clause'larda 'that' tutarlılığı korur.

questions.question: The documentary maker noted ---- communities in remote regions ---- not inherently resistant to change ---- they ---- access to resources and autonomy over decision-making.
options: A) that / are / as long as / have
D) what / are / as long as / have
E) that / were / as long as / had

feedback.hint: 'Noted that' → Simple Present gerçek aktarım. 'As long as they have' → gerçek koşul.
feedback.logic: 'Noted that communities are not resistant... as long as they have access' → genel gözlem → Simple Present. 'As long as + Simple Present' → gerçek koşul.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'were... had' → backshift; 'noted' genel gözlem aktarırken Simple Present kullanılabilir.

questions.question: It is a matter of considerable debate ---- the benefits of artificial intelligence ---- economic growth in developing nations or ---- new forms of inequality.

feedback.hint: 'Matter of debate whether' → evet/hayır noun clause. 'Will accelerate or exacerbate' → gelecek belirsizlik.
feedback.logic: 'It is a matter of debate whether X or Y' → evet/hayır noun clause. Gelecek tahmin → 'will accelerate / exacerbate'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'accelerates / exacerbates' → Simple Present; gelecekteki belirsizlik 'will' ile daha uygun.

questions.question: The professor told her students ---- they ---- the reading list too literally and ---- to engage critically with the arguments rather than simply summarising them.
options: A) that / had been approaching / needed
C) whether / had been approaching / needed
E) that / had been approaching / would need

feedback.hint: 'Told that' → backshift. 'Had been approaching too literally' → geçmişte süregelen tutum. 'Needed to engage' → backshifted 'need'.
feedback.logic: 'Told that' → backshift: 'were approaching' → 'had been approaching'. 'Need to engage' → 'needed to engage'. Her ikisi de backshift.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'were approaching / need' → tam backshift yapılmamış; 'told' backshift gerektirir.

questions.question: ---- truly distinguishes innovative thinkers from conventional problem-solvers is not ---- ideas they generate but ---- they tolerate ambiguity long enough to reach non-obvious solutions.
options: A) What / the quantity of / how well
B) That / how many / how well
D) How / the quantity of / how well
E) What / the quantity of / whether

feedback.hint: İlk: özne noun clause. İkinci: 'the quantity of ideas' — nicelik. Üçüncü: 'how well they tolerate' — biçim/derece.
feedback.logic: 'What distinguishes' = subject noun clause. 'Not the quantity of ideas they generate' = nesne. 'But how well they tolerate ambiguity' = 'how well' derece noun clause.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'how many' → sayı sorusu; 'the quantity of' aynı anlamı daha akademik ifade eder — A daha güçlü akademik dil.

questions.question: The career adviser asked each student ---- they ---- their career primarily in terms of financial reward and ---- factors ---- most influenced their professional values.
options: C) whether / had defined / what / had

feedback.hint: 'Asked whether' → evet/hayır dolaylı soru + backshift. 'What factors had influenced' → açık uçlu dolaylı soru.
feedback.logic: 'Asked whether they defined' → evet/hayır + backshift. 'What factors had influenced' = açık uçlu dolaylı soru + backshift.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'had defined' → over-shift; bir kez backshift (define → defined) yeterli.

questions.question: The findings of the survey underscore ---- consistent access to arts education ---- not only academic performance but also social cohesion and community identity.

feedback.hint: 'Underscore that' → olgusal noun clause. Genel bilimsel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Underscore that' → olgusal bağlaç. 'Enhances not only... but also' = genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'has enhanced' → Present Perfect; genel bilimsel gerçek Simple Present ile ifade edilir.

questions.question: The panel unanimously recommended ---- the grant ---- renewed for a further three years and ---- a mid-term evaluation ---- conducted at the eighteen-month mark.

feedback.hint: 'Recommended that' → subjunctive. İki paralel öneri, her ikisi de 'that' ile.
feedback.logic: 'Recommend that + subjunctive': 'be renewed / be conducted'. Her iki öneri 'that' noun clause içinde.
feedback.pitfall: E) İkinci 'that'ı düşürür; formal bağlamda paralel noun clause'larda 'that' tekrarı tutarlılığı korur.

questions.question: The novelist later acknowledged ---- she ---- the novel's central conflict from her own adolescent experiences and ---- its autobiographical nature had not been recognised sooner.
options: A) that / had drawn / that / she wished
C) whether / had drawn / that / she wishes
D) that / drew / that / she wished
E) that / had drawn / whether / she wished

feedback.hint: 'Acknowledged that' → backshift. İki itiraf/ifade paralel 'that' ile. 'She wished' → backshifted dilekçe.
feedback.logic: 'Acknowledged that she had drawn' → backshift + Past Perfect. 'And that she wished its nature had not been recognised sooner' → paralel 'that' + backshifted wish.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'drew' Simple Past backshift; anısini kendi deneyimden çıkarma itiraftan önce gerçekleşti → Past Perfect daha güçlü.

questions.question: Many adolescents struggle to explain ---- they feel most alienated from meaningful connection and ---- the digital interactions they ---- in partially compensate for that absence.

feedback.hint: Ne zaman yabancılaşıyorlar → 'when'. Dijital etkileşimlerin telafi edip etmediği → 'whether'. Genel alışkanlık.
feedback.logic: 'Explain when they feel most alienated' → zaman zarflığı noun clause. 'Whether digital interactions... partially compensate' → evet/hayır noun clause. 'Engage in' → genel alışkanlık → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'why' → neden sorusu; yabancılaşmanın ne zaman hissedildiği soruluyor — 'when' gerekli.

questions.question: The foundation is committed to ---- equitable access to STEM education and ---- that talent, not background, determines who enters the field.

feedback.hint: 'Be committed to + ...' edat tamlaması. Paralel gerund.
feedback.logic: 'Committed to + gerund': 'expanding / ensuring'. 'To' edat tamlaması her iki eylem için gerund gerektirir.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to ensure' → paraleli bozar; 'committed to' edat tamlaması → gerund 'ensuring' gerekli.

questions.question: The novelist spent three years ---- the most authentic narrative voice for her protagonist, only ---- that the story worked far better told from multiple perspectives.
options: D) to search for / to discover
E) having searched for / to discover

feedback.hint: 'Spend time + ...' yapısı. 'Only to + infinitive' → beklenmedik hayal kırıklığı.
feedback.logic: 'Spent + gerund': 'searching for'. 'Only to discover' → deyimsel beklenmedik sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'discovering' → 'only to discover' deyimsel yapı gerund ile karşılanamaz.

questions.question: Most teenagers tend ---- to criticism as a personal attack rather than ---- it as constructive input that could genuinely improve their work.

feedback.hint: 'Tend + ...' yapısı. 'Rather than + ...' edat.
feedback.logic: 'Tend + infinitive': 'to react'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'embracing'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to embrace' → 'rather than' edat olduğundan gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: The environmental agency proposed ---- the permitted noise levels in urban areas and ---- residents' exposure to industrial pollution through stricter monitoring.

feedback.hint: 'Propose + ...' (British English). Paralel gerund.
feedback.logic: 'Propose + gerund' (British English): 'lowering / limiting'. İki eylem paralel gerund.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to limit' → paraleli bozar; 'propose' British English'te gerund alır — 'limiting' gerekli.

questions.question: She came remarkably close to ---- the scholarship on her first attempt, ---- that relentless determination is the most significant predictor of eventual success.

feedback.hint: 'Come close to + ...' edat. 'Suggesting that' → eş zamanlı argüman.
feedback.logic: 'Come close to + gerund': 'winning'. 'Suggesting that' → eş zamanlı sonuç participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to suggest' → infinitive amaç bildirir; 'suggesting' participial eş zamanlılığı ifade eder.

questions.question: It is scarcely worth ---- all the variables in the model without first ---- whether the foundational assumptions themselves are valid.

feedback.hint: 'Worth + ...' yapısı. 'Without first + ...' edat.
feedback.logic: 'Worth + gerund': 'refining'. 'Without first + gerund': 'questioning'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to question' → 'without' edat → gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: The coach urged the team ---- a defensive strategy in the second half and ---- high-risk passes unless the scoreline demanded otherwise.

feedback.hint: 'Urge + object + ...' yapısı. Paralel olumsuz infinitive.
feedback.logic: 'Urge + object + infinitive': 'to adopt'. Paralel: 'and to avoid'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'avoiding' gerund → paralel yapı için 'to avoid' infinitive gerektirir.

questions.question: He deeply regrets ---- the opportunity to study abroad and acknowledges ---- more receptive to his mentor's advice at the time.
options: A) having missed / not having been
D) to have missed / not having been

feedback.hint: 'Regret + ...' geçmiş pişmanlık. 'Acknowledge + ...' → daha önce olmayan durum için perfect gerund.
feedback.logic: 'Regret + having done' = perfect gerund geçmiş pişmanlık. 'Acknowledge + not having been' = perfect gerund (o zamanda böyle olmadığını kabul etmek).
feedback.pitfall: B) 'missing / not being' → basit gerund; geçmişteki eylemlerin önceliği için perfect gerund daha güçlü.

questions.question: The award-winning photographer claims ---- inspired by street life in cities she ---- never previously visited, ---- a uniquely spontaneous quality to her work.
options: A) to have been / had / lending
D) to have been / had / to lend

feedback.hint: 'Claim + ...' yapısı. İlham geçmişte aldı → perfect infinitive. 'Previously visited' → Past Perfect. 'Lending quality' → eş zamanlı.
feedback.logic: 'Claim + to have been inspired' = perfect infinitive (geçmiş). 'She had never previously visited' = Past Perfect. 'Lending a unique quality' = eş zamanlı participial.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to be inspired' → basit infinitive; ilham geçmişte alındı → perfect infinitive gerekli.

questions.question: There is genuine merit in ---- digital skills across all school subjects rather than ---- them to dedicated technology classes.

feedback.hint: 'Merit in + ...' edat. 'Rather than + ...' edat.
feedback.logic: 'Merit in + gerund': 'embedding'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'confining'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to confine' → 'rather than' edat → gerund 'confining' gerektirir.

questions.question: The research institution, ---- interdisciplinary approach has attracted funding from across the globe, recently launched a fellowship programme ---- targets early-career scientists from under-represented backgrounds.

feedback.hint: İyelik: 'kurumun yaklaşımı'. 'A programme that targets' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'Whose interdisciplinary approach' → iyelik. 'A fellowship programme that targets early-career scientists' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'which targets' → defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart sınav tercihi.

questions.question: The year ---- the band released their debut single was also the year ---- they performed at the capital's largest outdoor venue for the very first time.

feedback.hint: 'The year when' → zaman zarflığı. Paralel yapı.
feedback.logic: 'The year when they released' + 'the year when they performed' → her ikisi de zarflık 'when' → paralel.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'in which' → resmi ama 'when' daha doğal ve paralel yapıyı korur.

questions.question: The social enterprise, through ---- work hundreds of marginalised young people ---- found pathways to employment, has just been recognised with a national award.
options: E) the work of which / has

feedback.hint: 'Through whose work' → preposition + iyelik. 'Hundreds have found' → plural.
feedback.logic: 'Through whose work' → preposition + iyelik. 'Hundreds of young people have found pathways' → plural → 'have'.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'the work of which / has' → singular fiil; 'hundreds of young people' plural → 'have' gerekli.

questions.question: The concept of 'digital wellbeing' is one ---- has gained traction in recent years and ---- educators are increasingly incorporating into their pastoral care frameworks.

feedback.hint: 'One that has gained traction' → defining subject. 'That educators are incorporating' → defining object.
feedback.logic: 'One that has gained traction' → defining subject: 'that'. 'That educators are increasingly incorporating' → defining object: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'which educators are incorporating' → defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart.

questions.question: There remain several unresolved questions about the long-term cognitive effects of screen time, ---- the most pressing ---- concerns its impact on the developing adolescent brain.
options: A) of which / is the one that
B) the most pressing of which / is
C) the most pressing of which / is the one that
D) which the most pressing / is
E) among which the most pressing / is

feedback.hint: 'The most pressing of which' → partitive yapı. 'Is the one that concerns' → tanımlama.
feedback.logic: 'Several questions, the most pressing of which is the question concerning its impact' → partitive: 'the most pressing of which'. 'Is' = singular.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'is the one that' redundant olur; 'the most pressing of which concerns its impact' doğrudan gerekli — B daha kısa ve doğal.

questions.question: The mentorship scheme is designed for students ---- academic potential has been identified but ---- circumstances have historically prevented them from accessing elite higher education.
options: D) of whom the / of whom the

feedback.hint: Her iki boşluk da iyelik bildiriyor: 'öğrencinin potansiyeli' ve 'öğrencinin koşulları'.
feedback.logic: 'Students whose academic potential' → iyelik. 'Whose circumstances have prevented' → iyelik. Her iki boşluk 'whose'.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'who have prevented' → aktif; koşullar öğrencileri engelledi — iyelik 'whose' gerekli.

questions.question: ----ever argues that social media has had no measurable impact on adolescent mental health must contend with a rapidly growing body of longitudinal data ---- directly contradicts that position.

feedback.hint: 'Whoever argues' → özne free relative. 'Data that contradicts' → defining subject.
feedback.logic: 'Whoever argues' = 'the person who argues' → subject free relative. 'A body of data that directly contradicts' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'Whomever' → nesne hali; 'argues' fiilinin öznesi → özne hali 'whoever' gerekli.

questions.question: The island ---- I spent the most formative summer of my adolescence no longer looks anything like the place ---- I discovered my passion for marine biology.

feedback.hint: Her iki boşluk da yer zarflığı bildiriyor. Paralel yapı.
feedback.logic: 'The island where I spent' + 'the place where I discovered' → her ikisi de zarflık 'where' → paralel.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'the place which I discovered' → 'discover a passion' nesne; 'where I discovered' zarflık daha doğal.

questions.question: The campaign has introduced several groundbreaking initiatives, the most innovative ---- being the peer-mentoring network ---- has already connected over ten thousand young people.

feedback.hint: 'The most innovative of which' → partitive. 'Network that has connected' → defining subject.
feedback.logic: 'The most innovative of which being the peer-mentoring network' → partitive: 'of which'. 'The network that has connected' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'which has connected' → defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart sınav tercihi.

questions.question: The innovation that ---- most excites the tech community is one ---- has the potential to transform not only how we communicate but also how we ---- and store information.

feedback.hint: 'One that has the potential to transform' → defining. 'How we process and store' → genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'One that has the potential' → defining: 'that'. 'How we process and store information' → genel gerçek → Simple Present: 'process'.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'will process' → gelecek; genel gerçek ifadesi için Simple Present gerekli.

questions.question: ---- growing recognition that ---- empathy is ---- teachable skill has prompted ---- shift in how social-emotional learning ---- prioritised in schools.
options: B) The / the / a / a / is

feedback.hint: 'A growing recognition' → ilk kez. 'Empathy' → soyut genel. 'A teachable skill' → ilk kez. 'A shift' → ilk kez. 'Is prioritised' → tekil özne.
feedback.logic: 'A growing recognition' belirsiz → 'a'. 'Empathy' genel soyut → article yok. 'A teachable skill' belirsiz → 'a'. 'A shift' belirsiz → 'a'. 'Learning is prioritised' tekil → 'is'.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'the growing recognition' → daha önce bahsedilmemiş → 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- sheer volume of ---- misinformation circulating online has created ---- urgent need for ---- more robust and transparent approach to platform governance.

feedback.hint: 'The sheer volume of' → sabit deyim. 'Misinformation' → genel. 'An urgent need' → ünlü. 'A more robust approach' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'The sheer volume of misinformation' → sabit deyim → 'the'; 'misinformation' genel → article yok. 'An urgent need' → 'u' ünlü → 'an'. 'A more robust approach' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'the misinformation' → genel sayılamaz kavram → article yok.

questions.question: ---- recent longitudinal study found that ---- students who engaged in ---- regular creative writing showed ---- notable gains in both ---- emotional vocabulary and ---- critical thinking.
options: B) The / the / a / the / the / the

feedback.hint: 'A recent study' → ilk kez. 'Students who engaged' → genel. 'Regular creative writing' → genel. 'Notable gains / emotional vocabulary / critical thinking' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'A recent longitudinal study' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'Students / regular creative writing / emotional vocabulary / critical thinking' genel → article yok. 'Notable gains' genel çoğul → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: B) tüm boşluklara 'the' koyar; genel kavramlar article almaz.

questions.question: ---- capacity of ---- human brain to rewire itself through ---- experience, ---- phenomenon known as neuroplasticity, has profound implications for ---- educational practice.
options: B) A / the / the / a / the

feedback.hint: 'The capacity of the human brain' → belirli. 'Through experience' → genel. 'A phenomenon known as' → belirsiz appositive. 'Educational practice' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'The capacity of the human brain' → belirli. 'Through experience' → genel → article yok. 'A phenomenon known as neuroplasticity' → belirsiz appositive → 'a'. 'Educational practice' → genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'through the experience' → genel deneyim kavramı belirli değil; article yok.

questions.question: ---- fact that ---- access to ---- quality mentorship dramatically increases ---- likelihood of social mobility remains one of ---- most compelling arguments for educational investment.
options: B) A / the / a / the / the

feedback.hint: 'The fact that' → sabit deyim. 'Access to quality mentorship' → genel. 'The likelihood' → belirli. 'The most compelling arguments' → superlative.
feedback.logic: 'The fact that' → sabit deyim → 'the'. 'Access to quality mentorship' → genel → article yok. 'The likelihood of social mobility' → belirli → 'the'. 'The most compelling arguments' → superlative → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'the quality mentorship' → 'quality mentorship' genel sıfatlı isim → article yok.

questions.question: ---- transition from ---- adolescence to ---- adulthood is rarely linear; ---- period of ambiguity and self-questioning is, for many, ---- unavoidable and ultimately formative stage.
options: B) A / the / the / a / the
C) The / the / the / a / an

feedback.hint: 'The transition from adolescence to adulthood' → belirli + soyut genel. 'A period' → ilk kez. 'An unavoidable stage' → ünlü.
feedback.logic: 'The transition' → belirli + soyut genel (article yok). 'A period of ambiguity' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'An unavoidable and ultimately formative stage' → 'u' ünlü → 'an'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'the adolescence / the adulthood' → soyut genel kavramlar → article yok.

questions.question: ---- neither of ---- two proposals satisfied all ---- board members, ---- independent arbitration panel ---- convened to broker a compromise.
options: A) As / the / the / an / was
D) As / the / the / a / was
E) Given that / the / the / an / were

feedback.hint: 'As neither' → neden bağlacı. 'The two proposals' → belirli. 'The board members' → belirli. 'An independent panel' → ünlü + ilk kez. 'Panel was convened' → tekil.
feedback.logic: 'As' → neden. 'The two proposals' → belirli. 'The board members' → belirli. 'An independent arbitration panel' → 'i' ünlü → 'an'. 'Was convened' → tekil.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'were convened' → plural; 'panel' tekil özne → 'was' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- passion she demonstrated for ---- environmental advocacy, combined with ---- remarkable ability to communicate complex issues clearly, made her ---- exceptionally strong candidate.

feedback.hint: 'The passion she demonstrated' → sıfat tamlaması. 'Environmental advocacy' → genel. 'A remarkable ability' → ilk kez. 'An exceptionally strong candidate' → ünlü.
feedback.logic: 'The passion she demonstrated' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'Environmental advocacy' → genel → article yok. 'A remarkable ability' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'An exceptionally strong candidate' → 'e' ünlü → 'an'.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'the environmental advocacy' → genel savunuculuk kavramı → article yok.

questions.question: ---- lack of ---- reliable public transport in rural areas forces many young people to depend on ---- private vehicles, ---- situation that perpetuates both financial hardship and ---- social isolation.
options: B) A / the / the / a / the

feedback.hint: 'The lack of reliable transport' → belirli. 'Reliable transport / private vehicles / financial hardship / social isolation' → genel. 'A situation' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'The lack of reliable public transport' → belirli. 'Rural areas / private vehicles' → genel → article yok. 'A situation that perpetuates' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'Financial hardship / social isolation' → genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'the private vehicles' → genel araç kullanımı belirli değil → article yok.

questions.question: ---- extent to ---- which social media contributes to ---- radicalisation among young people remains ---- deeply contested empirical question that ---- ongoing research has yet to resolve definitively.

feedback.hint: 'The extent to which' → sabit deyim. 'Radicalisation' → soyut genel. 'A deeply contested question' → ilk kez. 'Ongoing research' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'The extent to which' → sabit deyim → 'the'. 'Radicalisation' → genel → article yok. 'A deeply contested empirical question' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'Ongoing research' → genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'the deeply contested question' → belirli; ilk kez tanıtılan → 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- its widespread adoption in healthcare settings, AI-assisted diagnostics has yet to demonstrate the kind of reliability ---- would justify ---- replacing human clinical judgement entirely.
options: C) In spite of / that / entirely

feedback.hint: 'Widespread adoption' → isim öbeği. 'The kind of reliability that' → defining relative. 'Fully replacing' → adverb placement.
feedback.logic: 'Notwithstanding + noun phrase' → resmi edat bağlacı. 'The kind of reliability that would justify' → defining: 'that'. 'Fully replacing' → adverb + gerund.
feedback.pitfall: A) 'Despite / that / fully' → 'fully' doğru pozisyon ama A şıkkında 'Despite' yerine 'Notwithstanding' daha akademik ve resmi.

questions.question: The workshop proved valuable ---- for the participants ---- for the facilitators, ---- prompted many of them to reconsider their pedagogical assumptions.
options: A) not only / but also / which
C) not only / but also / that
E) not only / but also / thereby

feedback.hint: 'Not only... but also' → paralel. İkinci boşluk tüm cümleye atıf → non-defining.
feedback.logic: 'Not only for participants but also for facilitators' → paralel. İkinci boşluk tüm önceki fikre atıf → non-defining → 'which'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'that' → non-defining bağlamda kullanılamaz; virgüllü non-defining clause 'which' alır.

questions.question: ---- the scientific consensus on vaccine safety is clear and well-documented, public trust in immunisation programmes has eroded in some communities, ---- that misinformation can undermine even the most evidence-based interventions.

feedback.hint: 'Although + full clause' → zıtlık. 'Demonstrating that' → eş zamanlı sonuç participial.
feedback.logic: 'Although the consensus is clear' → tam cümle zıtlık bağlacı. 'Demonstrating that misinformation can undermine' → eş zamanlı sonuç participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'thereby demonstrating' → 'thereby' sonuç participial için güçlü ama 'demonstrating' alone doğal; her ikisi kabul edilebilir, A daha temiz.

questions.question: The young athlete broke three national records this season; ----, she has been passed over for the national team, ---- raising questions about the selection criteria.

feedback.hint: Noktalı virgül + zıtlık. 'Thereby raising questions' → eylemin sonucu.
feedback.logic: 'Yet' → noktalı virgül sonrası zıtlık. 'Thereby raising questions' → eylemin mantıksal sonucu participial.
feedback.pitfall: D) 'thus raising' → dilbilgisel mümkün ama 'thereby + gerund' participial yapıyla daha standart sınav tercihi.

questions.question: The curriculum reform was designed ---- to punish underperforming students ---- to identify and address the systemic barriers ---- have historically limited their access to quality instruction.
options: B) not only / but also / which

feedback.hint: 'Not to X but rather to Y' → doğrultma. 'Barriers that have limited' → defining subject.
feedback.logic: 'Not to punish but rather to identify and address' → doğrultma yapısı. 'Systemic barriers that have historically limited' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'which' → defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart sınav tercihi.

questions.question: ---- the rapid pace of technological change is undeniable, ---- is the need for education systems to evolve in response, ---- that adaptability, rather than fixed knowledge, is now the most valuable skill.
options: C) While / so too / to suggest

feedback.hint: 'While X is undeniable, so too is Y' → paralel vurgu. 'Suggesting that' → sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'While the pace is undeniable, so too is the need' → paralel yapı. 'Suggesting that adaptability is the most valuable skill' → eş zamanlı sonuç participial.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'to suggest' → infinitive amaç bildirir; 'suggesting' participial eş zamanlılığı ifade eder.

questions.question: The community project succeeded ---- in raising funds ---- in building meaningful partnerships with local businesses, ---- that genuine impact requires both financial and social capital.
options: A) not only / but also / demonstrating
C) not only / but also / thereby demonstrating
E) not only / but also / demonstrated

feedback.hint: 'Not only... but also' → paralel. 'Demonstrating that' → eş zamanlı sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Not only in raising funds but also in building partnerships' → paralel. 'Demonstrating that genuine impact requires' → eş zamanlı sonuç participial.
feedback.pitfall: E) 'demonstrated' → bağımsız fiil gibi okutulur; 'demonstrating' participial eş zamanlı sonucu bildirir.

questions.question: The report concluded ---- youth unemployment is not merely ---- economic issue but ---- deeply rooted social phenomenon ---- requires structural, not just cyclical, policy responses.

feedback.hint: 'Concluded that' → noun clause. 'Not merely an economic issue but a deeply rooted social phenomenon'. 'Phenomenon that requires' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'Concluded that' → noun clause. 'An economic issue' → ünlü → 'an'. 'A deeply rooted social phenomenon' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'A phenomenon that requires' → defining: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: B) 'which requires' → defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart.

questions.question: ---- the research data is compelling, several methodological limitations ---- reduce confidence in the findings; ----, further longitudinal studies are urgently needed.
options: D) Even though / still / as a result

feedback.hint: 'While + full clause' → kısmi zıtlık. 'Still reduce confidence' → buna rağmen. 'Consequently, further studies needed' → sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'While the data is compelling' → kısmi zıtlık. 'Still reduce confidence' → devam eden sorun. 'Consequently, further studies are needed' → mantıksal sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'therefore' → 'consequently' ve 'therefore' yakın ama A'daki 'consequently' daha akademik.

questions.question: The festival brought together artists from over thirty countries, ---- fostering ---- cultural dialogue ---- mutual understanding that few other events of its scale ---- managed to achieve.
options: B) thus / not only / but also / have

feedback.hint: 'Thereby fostering' → eylemin sonucu. 'Both... and' → paralel. 'Few other events... have managed' → plural.
feedback.logic: 'Thereby fostering' → eylemin mantıksal sonucu participial. 'Both cultural dialogue and mutual understanding' → paralel. 'Few other events... have managed' → 'events' plural → 'have'.
feedback.pitfall: C) 'has managed' → 'events' plural → 'have managed' gerekli.
